title: Puhar contains multiple civic functions
claim_or_observation: The city includes festival streets, gardens, halls, royal spaces, confinement, feeding and religious institutions

title: Prison becomes care institution
claim_or_observation: The king transforms a prison into a charitable place with kitchens, lodging and feeding

title: Chakravala is a boundary landscape
claim_or_observation: Chakravala or cremation-ground space is associated with walls, entrances, death, refuge and philosophical reflection
notes: Do not convert into generic horror scenery

title: Poompuhar wharf interpretation
claim_or_observation: Brick walls, platforms and wooden posts at Kizharveli are interpreted as a wharf
notes: Full excavation report required for dimensions and phasing

title: Keeladi brick timber and roof system
claim_or_observation: Brick structures, post holes, iron nails and grooved roofing tiles support mixed brick timber and tiled construction
notes: Comparative regional evidence not direct Puhar architecture

title: Keeladi ring wells
claim_or_observation: Terracotta ring wells were excavated with interlocking rings and decorated upper elements
notes: Function and neighbourhood context require specialist review

title: Kanchipuram early historic water and trade remains
claim_or_observation: A deep terracotta ring well, roofing tiles, rouletted ware and Tamil-Brahmi sherds were reported in early historic layers
notes: Official page combines excavation summaries; full site report required

title: Vasavasamudram ring wells and tank
claim_or_observation: Two ring wells near a brick-lined tank tentatively associated with washing or dyeing show linked water and production spaces
notes: Comparative coastal evidence not direct Puhar plan

title: Ring well function is contextual
claim_or_observation: A ring well cannot automatically be labelled drinking well, soakage pit, drain or sewer without context

title: Poetic splendour is not a construction drawing
claim_or_observation: Literary descriptions of gold, marble, height or abundance do not provide exact dimensions or materials

title: Later monumental architecture exclusion
claim_or_observation: Later Pallava and imperial Chola temples, gopurams and palaces are not automatic models for the epic's earlier city world

title: Infrastructure reveals political purpose
claim_or_observation: Water, access, confinement, feeding, storage and public halls are designed as connected systems that reveal institutional choices
notes: Requires architecture, archaeology and public-health review
